summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated open PRs are classified conservatively as independent backlog items; unavailable refs are blocked on missing live state from the preflight artifact.

actions.reason: Independent open PR; no shared canonical or duplicate relationship should be invented.
